failedAssertions.reason: Requires terminal run states with per-source warnings/errors. browser_only runs do not complete within test window (45+ seconds elapsed, grounded_web stage stalls). Cannot trigger credential failure scenarios with valid service account.
Requires terminal degraded run with source-caused degradation. browser_only run did not terminalize.
Requires terminal degraded run to verify fallback paths emit structured warning/error indicators. browser_only run did not terminalize.
Requires terminal run to verify health warnings are causally traceable to run-status. browser_only run did not terminalize.
Requires credential preflight failure scenario (invalid/missing service account). Service account is valid and configured, cannot trigger preflight fail-closed without invalidating credentials.

appliedUpdates.description: Added known friction: grounded_web stage can take 5+ minutes or stall, blocking VAL-OBS-005/006/007/008. VAL-API-004 confirms terminalization works but requires ats_plus_ats or browser_plus_ats with actual job listings. Browser-only discovery runs may not terminalize within reasonable test windows.
